sections.paragraph:
ἰουδαΐζω live as one bound by Mosaic ordinances or traditions, live in Judean or Jewish fashion (so Plut., Cic. 864 [7, 6]; Esth 8:17; Jos., Bell. 2, 454 μέχρι περιτομῆς ἰ.; s. also 463; Acta Pilati A 2, 1) Gal 2:14; BWander, Gottesfürchtige und Sympathisanten (WUNT 104) ’98, 212–18; IMg 10:3.—TW.

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Acta Pilati Acta Pilati —List 5

WUNT WUNT = Wissenschaftliche Untersuchungen zum NT

IMg IMg = Ignatius to the Magnesians—List 1

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 478
